name: Racing HUD
description: Race telemetry overlay for Zwift - power zones, W' balance, HR, peaks, TSS, calories, and nearby riders.
author: Tom Meese

windows.name: Racing HUD - Left
windows.description: Left panel: power, HR zones, W' balance, peaks, TSS, calories, and nearby rider table.

windows.name: Racing HUD - Right
windows.description: Right panel: race position, gap ahead/behind, course map, groups, and chat.
